nodes.context: Camorra clan operating in northeast Naples area, based in Piazzolla di Nola, leading a confederation of clans in Campania.
Confederation of Camorra clans formed between 1979 and 1981 to counter the NCO.
Camorra clan, part of the Nuova Famiglia initially, later in conflict with Clan Alfieri.
Camorra clan led by Antonio Bardellino, part of the Nuova Famiglia.
Camorra clan from Poggiomarino, allied with Clan Alfieri.
Sicilian mafia, allied with the Nuova Famiglia against the NCO.
Camorra organization led by Raffaele Cutolo, opposed by the Nuova Famiglia.
Camorra clan from Torre Annunziata, targeted in the Sant'Alessandro massacre.
Camorra clan from Sant'Anastasia, allied with Clan Alfieri.
Camorra clan from Afragola, allied with Clan Alfieri.
Camorra clan from Boscoreale/Boscotrecase, allied with Clan Alfieri.
Alliance between Nuvoletta and Gionta clans, in conflict with Clan Alfieri.
Camorra clan in conflict with Clan Alfieri.
Camorra clan in conflict with Clan Alfieri over western Naples.
Former NCO clan in conflict with Clan Alfieri.
Camorra clan from Castellammare di Stabia, led by Ferdinando Cesarano, allied with Clan Alfieri.
Camorra clan from Nola, allied with Clan Alfieri.
Camorra clan led by Salvatore Russo, allied with Clan Alfieri.
Camorra clan from Pagani, led by Salvatore Serra, allied with Clan Alfieri.

nodes.original_text_name: clan del cutoliano Salvatore Di Maio
nodes.context: Camorra clan led by Salvatore Di Maio, in conflict with Clan Serra.

edges.evidence_quote: Tra il 1979 ed il 1981 si ha una confederazione di clan camorristici, chiamata la Nuova Famiglia , in cui confluivano i Nuvoletta , il clan dei Casalesi con Antonio Bardellino , Umberto Ammaturo , il clan Galasso e il clan Alfieri
edges.context: Clan Alfieri was a member of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.

edges.evidence_quote: Il clan Alfieri che, durante la guerra contro la NCO di Raffaele Cutolo , offre una sponda sicura alla Nuova Famiglia
edges.context: Clan Alfieri fought against the NCO as part of the Nuova Famiglia.

edges.evidence_quote: confederazione di clan camorristici, chiamata la Nuova Famiglia ... vicina a Cosa nostra per contrastare la NCO di Raffaele Cutolo
edges.context: Nuova Famiglia was formed to oppose the NCO.

edges.evidence_quote: vicina a Cosa nostra per contrastare la NCO di Raffaele Cutolo
edges.context: Nuova Famiglia was allied with Cosa Nostra against the NCO.

edges.evidence_quote: strage di Sant'Alessandro : un commando ... uccide 8 persone appartenenti al clan Gionta
edges.context: Clan Alfieri carried out a massacre against the Gionta clan.

edges.evidence_quote: conflitti e contrasti ... con il cartello Nuvoletta - Gionta
edges.context: Clan Alfieri was in conflict with the Nuvoletta-Gionta cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: conflitti e contrasti ... con il clan D'Alessandro
edges.context: Clan Alfieri was in conflict with the D'Alessandro clan.

edges.evidence_quote: conflitti e contrasti ... i Licciardi (d'intralcio alle mire sulla zona occidentale di Napoli)
edges.context: Clan Alfieri was in conflict with the Licciardi clan over territory.
Clan Alfieri was in conflict with the Rosanova-Abbagnale clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Il clan stringe nuove alleanze: con i Galasso di Poggiomarino
edges.context: Clan Alfieri allied with the Galasso clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Il clan stringe nuove alleanze: con ... gli Anastasio di Sant'Anastasia
edges.context: Clan Alfieri allied with the Anastasio clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Il clan stringe nuove alleanze: con ... i Moccia di Afragola
edges.context: Clan Alfieri allied with the Moccia clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Il clan stringe nuove alleanze: con ... il clan Vangone-Limelli di Boscoreale / Boscotrecase
edges.context: Clan Alfieri allied with the Vangone-Limelli clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Ferdinando Cesarano , da Castellammare di Stabia , luogotenente di Carmine Alfieri e boss del clan Cesarano
edges.context: Clan Cesarano was a subordinate ally of Clan Alfieri.

edges.evidence_quote: Pasquale Russo , boss dell' omonimo clan nolano
edges.context: Clan Russo was allied with Clan Alfieri.

edges.evidence_quote: Salvatore Russo , boss del clan omonimo , legato agli Alfieri
edges.context: Clan Salvatore Russo was allied with Clan Alfieri.

edges.evidence_quote: Salvatore Serra , da Pagani ... figlioccio di Carmine Alfieri , capo di un gruppo satellite
edges.context: Clan Serra was a satellite group allied with Clan Alfieri.

edges.evidence_quote: in lotta col clan del cutoliano Salvatore Di Maio
edges.context: Clan Serra was in conflict with the Di Maio clan.
